title: Worktree switcher dropdown component with click-outside detection
purpose: Provides a UI component for switching between active worktrees in a chat interface, with a dropdown list that closes when clicking outside.
module_context: Exports a React functional component WorktreeSwitcher that accepts worktrees, active session ID, and a switch handler as props. Also exports the WorktreeEntry and WorktreeSwitcherProps interfaces.

steps.content: Initialize the open state to false and create a ref for the container element.
Set up a side effect to add and remove a click handler for detecting clicks outside the component.
Determine the active worktree based on the session ID or fall back to the first worktree.
Generate the label text for the active worktree using branch or path.
Define a handler for when a worktree is selected, which closes the dropdown and calls the switch handler.
Render the button showing the current worktree label and dropdown arrow.
IF the dropdown is open, render the list of worktrees with styling for active selection.
Check if the click target is outside the component container.
IF the click is outside, close the dropdown.
Trigger the switch handler with the selected session ID.
